---
title: "Deriving pain transitions"
author: "Alexandria Andrayas"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  word_document:
    toc: true
#  html_document:
#    toc: true
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=TRUE)
```

# Load packages

```{r packages, message=FALSE, echo=F}
library(tidyverse)
library(gt)
library(labelled)
library(gtsummary)
library(ggalluvial)
library(scales)
```

# Load and subset data and specify paths

```{r data, echo=F}
# Path to data
path_to_data <- "//path/to/data/"

# Path to outputs
path_to_outputs <- "//path/to/outputs/"

# Load dataset
load(paste0(path_to_data,'clean_data.rda'))

# Subset dataset to those with data on pain at ages 26 AND 30
df <- alldf[!is.na(alldf$pain_status_26) & !is.na(alldf$pain_status_30),]

# Load network scores
load(paste0(path_to_data,"imp_netw_z_scs.rda"))

# Covariates
covariates <- c('sex','ethnicity','parent_sc_0', 'pain_prob_7','parent_pain_12')
```

# Variable labels

```{r labs, echo=F}
varlabs <- list(
  'pain_status_26'='Pain status (26y)',
  'pain_status_30'='Pain status (30y)'
  )

var_label(df[,names(varlabs)]) <- varlabs
```

# Pain transitions

## Crosstab

```{r x-tab, echo=FALSE}
# Cross-tabulate
ctab <- table(df$pain_status_26, df$pain_status_30)

ctab_disp <- as.data.frame(ctab) %>%
  tibble::as_tibble() %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Var1) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    row_pct=Freq / sum(Freq),
    cell   =sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", Freq, 100 * row_pct)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(Var1, Var2, cell) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from =Var2,
    values_from=cell
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(`Pain status at age 26`=Var1)

ctab_disp %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label="Pain status at age 30",
    columns=-`Pain status at age 26`
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align="left",
    columns=`Pain status at age 26`
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style=cell_text(weight="bold"),
    locations=cells_column_labels(everything())
  )
```

### Grouping

```{r pain-trans-labs, echo=FALSE}
ctab_df <- sapply(ctab_disp, as.character)

transition_labs <- rbind(
  c("No pain", "Acute", "Worsening", "Worsening"),
  c("Acute", "Acute", "Worsening", "Worsening"),
  c("Improving", "Improving", "Persisting, low impact", "Worsening"),
  c("Improving", "Improving", "Improving", "Persisting, high impact")
)

ctab_df[1:4, 2:5] <- transition_labs

ctab_df %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label='Pain status at age 30',
    columns=-`Pain status at age 26`
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align='right',
    columns=`Pain status at age 26`
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style=cell_text(weight='bold'),
    locations=list(cells_column_labels(columns=`Pain status at age 26`),
                     cells_column_spanners(spanners='Pain status at age 30')
    )) %>%
  tab_style(
    style=cell_text(style='italic'),
    locations=cells_body(
      columns=-`Pain status at age 26`
    ))
```

## Numbers

```{r pain-trans-ns, echo=FALSE}
# Function to derive pain transitions
make_pain_transition_num <- function(p26, p30) {
  
  p26 <- as.character(p26)
  p30 <- as.character(p30)
  
  case_when(
    p26 == 'No pain' & p30 == 'No pain' ~ 1,
    
    p26 %in% c('No pain', 'Acute pain') &
      p30 %in% c('No pain', 'Acute pain') ~ 2,
    
    p26 %in% c('Chronic pain, low impact', 'Chronic pain, high impact') &
      p30 %in% c('No pain', 'Acute pain') ~ 3,
    
    p26 == 'Chronic pain, high impact' &
      p30 == 'Chronic pain, low impact' ~ 3,
    
    p26 == 'Chronic pain, low impact' &
      p30 == 'Chronic pain, low impact' ~ 4,
    
    p26 == 'Chronic pain, high impact' &
      p30 == 'Chronic pain, high impact' ~ 5,
    
    p26 %in% c('No pain', 'Acute pain') &
      p30 %in% c('Chronic pain, low impact', 'Chronic pain, high impact') ~ 6,
    
    p26 == 'Chronic pain, low impact' &
      p30 == 'Chronic pain, high impact' ~ 6,
    
    TRUE ~ NA
  )
}

# Create derived pain transition variable (in those with pain data at both timepoints)
df$pain_transition_26to30 <- make_pain_transition_num(
  df$pain_status_26,
  df$pain_status_30
)

df$pain_transition_26to30 <- factor(df$pain_transition_26to30, levels=1:6, labels=c('No pain','Acute','Improving','Persisting, low impact','Persisting, high impact','Worsening'))

# Assign label
var_label(df$pain_transition_26to30) <- 'Pain transitions (from ages 26 to 30)'

# Add pain transition variable to imputed network scores
imp_netw_z_scs <- lapply(imp_netw_z_scs, function(x){
  out <- bind_cols(x, 'pain_transition_26to30' = df$pain_transition_26to30)
  out
})

# Add covariates to imputed network scores
imp_netw_z_scs <- lapply(imp_netw_z_scs, function(x){
  out <- bind_cols(x, df[,covariates])
  out
})

save(imp_netw_z_scs, file=paste0(path_to_data,"imp_netw_z_scs.rda")
```

## Pain state and transitions table

```{r pain-states, echo=FALSE}
pain_st_trans_tab <- tbl_merge(
  tbls = list(
    tbl_summary(
      df,
      include = c("pain_status_26", "pain_status_30", "pain_transition_26to30")
    ) %>%
      italicize_levels() %>%
      modify_header(stat_0 ~ "**Overall**  \nN = {N}"),
    
    tbl_summary(
      df,
      include = c("sex", "pain_status_26", "pain_status_30", "pain_transition_26to30"),
      by = "sex"
    ) %>%
      italicize_levels() %>%
      add_p()
  ),
  tab_spanner = FALSE
) %>% 
  as_gt() 

pain_st_trans_tab

pain_st_trans_tab %>% gtsave(filename=paste0(path_to_outputs,"pain_st_trans_tab.docx"))
```

## Alluvial plot

```{r pain-states, echo=FALSE}
raw_state_levels <- c(
  "No pain",
  "Acute pain",
  "Chronic pain, low impact",
  "Chronic pain, high impact"
)

state_levels <- c(
  "No pain",
  "Acute pain",
  "Chronic low-impact",
  "Chronic high-impact"
)

cols <- c(
  "No pain" = "#E69F00",
  "Acute pain" = "#56B4E9",
  "Chronic low-impact" = "#009E73",
  "Chronic high-impact" = "#CC79A7"
)

# transition counts
pain_flow <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(pain_status_26), !is.na(pain_status_30)) %>%
  count(
    pain_status_26 = factor(pain_status_26, levels = raw_state_levels, labels = state_levels),
    pain_status_30 = factor(pain_status_30, levels = raw_state_levels, labels = state_levels),
    name = "n"
  )

# totals for percentages
n_total <- sum(pain_flow$n)

age26_totals <- pain_flow %>%
  group_by(pain_status_26) %>%
  summarise(n_origin = sum(n), .groups = "drop")

age30_totals <- pain_flow %>%
  group_by(pain_status_30) %>%
  summarise(n_dest = sum(n), .groups = "drop")

# base alluvial plot
base_plt <- ggplot(pain_flow, aes(axis1 = pain_status_26, axis2 = pain_status_30, y = n)) +
  geom_alluvium(
    aes(fill = pain_status_26),
    alpha = 0.70, width = 0.1, knot.pos = 0.4, 
    colour = "white", linewidth = 0.15, discern = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_stratum(
    width = 0.1, fill = "white", linewidth = 0.6, colour = 'white', discern = TRUE
  )

# actual stratum positions from built plot
strata_pos <- ggplot_build(base_plt)$data[[2]] %>%
  transmute(
    x,
    state = case_when(
      x == 2 ~ str_remove(as.character(stratum), "\\.1$"),
      TRUE   ~ as.character(stratum)
    ),
    state = factor(state, levels = state_levels),
    ymin, ymax,
    ymid = (ymin + ymax) / 2
  )

age26_pos <- strata_pos %>% filter(x == 1)
age30_pos <- strata_pos %>% filter(x == 2)

# left-side headers: age-26 state labels
left_headers <- age26_pos %>%
  left_join(age26_totals, by = c("state" = "pain_status_26")) %>%
  mutate(header = paste0(state, " (n = ", comma(n_origin), ")"))

# right-side transition labels: count + % within age-26 state
right_labs <- pain_flow %>%
  left_join(age26_totals, by = "pain_status_26") %>%
  group_by(pain_status_30) %>%
  arrange(desc(match(pain_status_26, state_levels)), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(y_within = cumsum(n) - n / 2) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(age30_pos %>% select(state, ymin), by = c("pain_status_30" = "state")) %>%
  mutate(
    y = ymin + y_within,
    label = paste0(comma(n), " (", percent(n / n_origin, accuracy = 1), ")")
  )

# right-side headers: age-30 state labels
right_headers <- age30_pos %>%
  left_join(age30_totals, by = c("state" = "pain_status_30")) %>%
  mutate(header = state_levels[match(state, state_levels)])

# right brackets
bracket_gap <- 20  

right_brackets <- age30_pos %>%
  mutate(
    y0 = ymin + if_else(ymin > 0, bracket_gap / 2, 0),
    y1 = ymax - if_else(ymax < n_total, bracket_gap / 2, 0),
    x = 2.16,
    tick = -0.02
  )

# updated plot
alluv_plt <- base_plt +
  geom_text(
    data = left_headers,
    aes(x = "Age 26", y = ymid, label = header),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    position = position_nudge(x = 0),
    hjust = 1,
    size = 8, size.unit = "pt",
    colour = "grey20"
  ) +
  geom_label(
    data = right_labs,
    aes(x = "Age 30", y = y, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    position = position_nudge(x = -0.045),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 8, size.unit = "pt",
    colour = "grey30",
    fill = "white",
    linewidth = 0,
    label.padding = unit(0.08, "lines")
  ) + 
  geom_segment(
    data = right_brackets,
    aes(x = x, xend = x, y = y0, yend = y1),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    colour = "grey45",
    linewidth = 0.4
    ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = right_brackets,
    aes(x = x, xend = x + tick, y = y0, yend = y0),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    colour = "grey45",
    linewidth = 0.4
    ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = right_brackets,
    aes(x = x, xend = x + tick, y = y1, yend = y1),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    colour = "grey45",
    linewidth = 0.4
    ) +
  geom_text(
    data = right_headers,
    aes(x = "Age 30", y = ymid, label = header),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    position = position_nudge(x = 0.2),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 8, size.unit = "pt",
    colour = "grey20",
    lineheight = 0.5
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    limits = c("Age 26", "Age 30"),
    expand = expansion(add = c(0.2, 0.15))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.01))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "Pain state at age 26:  ") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, colour = "grey30"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box.margin = margin(t = 20),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.margin = margin(5, 80, 5, 60)
  )

alluv_plt

ggsave(plot=alluv_plt, filename=paste0(path_to_outputs,"alluv_plt.png"), width=174, height=194, units="mm", dpi=350)
```
